title: Copyright, Trademark & Legal Symbols: Copy & Paste © ® ™
meta_description: Copy and paste copyright, registered, trademark, and other legal Unicode symbols — ©, ®, ™, ℠, ℗, and more. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every copyright, trademark, and intellectual-property symbol in Unicode — ©, ®, ™, ℠, ℗, and the office marks that go with them. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Legal and intellectual-property symbols mark ownership, registration, and rights. This library collects the copyright sign, registered trademark, trademark and service marks, and related office and numero marks so you can paste the correct character anywhere.

sections.label: Copyright
sections.intro: The core ownership marks: copyright, registered trademark, sound-recording copyright, and circled letter variants.

sections.label: Trademark
sections.intro: Trademark and service-mark signs used to denote brand and service identifiers.

sections.label: Office Marks
sections.intro: Letterlike office abbreviations and the numero sign frequently paired with legal text.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.

related.title: Currency Symbols
related.desc: Dollar, euro, pound, yen, and every other Unicode currency sign.

related.title: Number Symbols
related.desc: Circled, superscript, Roman, and other Unicode number forms.
